## Problem and solution

Describe the user problem and the focused solution.

## Compatibility impact

List affected Unity, macOS, OpenXR, and Quest versions or state “none”.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests were added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] Exact commands and results are listed below.
- [ ] Hardware/licensed checks that were not run are explicitly listed.

## Documentation

- [ ] `docs/spec.md` reflects behavior or compatibility changes.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` reflects user-visible changes.
- [ ] Setup docs were updated if installation or operation changed.
